_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibition Enhances the Antitumor Effect of Radiotherapy in NF1-Deficient Glioblastoma.

_contextSnippet: three having BRAF V600E with intact NF1 (B76, DBTRG, NMCG1)...highest sensitivity in those with loss of NF1 or BRAF V600E alterations...Adherent cell lines with BRAF V600E or NF1-deficiency also displayed additive or synergistic response
details: BRAF V600E with intact NF1 line showing highest sensitivity to MEKi and additive/synergistic response to MEKi combined with radiation
